posts.author: ndonag (Nathalie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am trying to figure out a way to make a text column all the same unique value for purchase orders in my board. Each group is a unique order, and each order has 10-15 items on it. Each item is unique but things like the external PO, internal PO, quote number etc are all the same value. So I have about 5 columns that need to have all the same value, and I’d like to accomplish this without copying and pasting the same value for each column. Is there an easy way to do this?

I originally had orders as items instead of groups and units as sub items, but the app I use to do integrations doesn’t support subitem auto fill. Any suggestions would be much appreciated
